title: Iowaâ€™s Renewable Fuels Infrastructure Program Awards Record Number of Projects
content: Iowaâ€™s cost-share Renewable Fuels Infrastructure Program (RFIP) has recently awarded almost $3 million in grants for Iowa fuel retail locations to add E15 to 111 retail sites throughout the state. This is the highest number of projects awarded to date, on track to meet the E15 Access Standard deadline of January 1, 2026. In addition to the grants today, the Iowa Department of Agriculture and Land Stewardship announced they have already received 145 applications to be considered at the next RFIP board meeting.
author: Analysts Account
